prompt: Original premium game health heart icon concept for a wellness app. Combine the restrained futuristic HUD framing of a sci-fi medical game interface with the stronger armored heart silhouette of a heroic action-RPG icon. Smooth red heart, slightly shielded lower point, readable first, premium second.
style: premium game UI icon, polished, restrained sci-fi HUD, smooth heart curvature, subtle armored geometry
composition: single centered heart icon inside a minimal futuristic targeting frame, isolated asset
lighting: soft pulse glow from the heart core, dim HUD highlights, dark presentation
palette: crimson red heart, tiny cool blue and warm gold HUD accents, mostly red-focused
materials: polished enamel heart with clean digital HUD lines
constraints: original design, no text, no letters, no anatomy, no character, no heavy panel background, transparent background
negative: pixel art, retro sprite, gore, realistic organ, cartoon mascot, cluttered UI screenshot
